title: quercus × prasina
intro: Quercus × prasina, also known as the Chinese evergreen oak or Chinese green oak, is a hybrid species of oak tree that is native to China and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quercus × prasina include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Quercus × prasina can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
